patterns.phantom_issue_reconcile: ALWAYS gh api issues?labels=sergo&state=all&sort=created&per_page=25 BEFORE strategy; reconstruct missed runs. R37 created #39323/4 w/o committing memory. R40 reconcile clean.
patterns.syntactic_stdlib_match: STRONGEST recurring land-arg. ident.Name=='<pkg>' w/o TypesInfo -> FP(shadow/local var named pkg)+FN(alias import). Correct: pass.TypesInfo.ObjectOf(ident).(*types.PkgName).Imported().Path()=='<pkg>'. Canonical helper=astutil.IsFmtErrorf (astutil.go:51-73). LANDED: sortslice #38029. OPEN same-class: ctxbackground #38789, regexpcompileinfunction #39733, rawloginlib #sg40a1. STILL-UNFILED same-class (R41 candidates, identical gap CONFIRMED R40): osexitinlibrary.go:59 'os', fprintlnsprintf.go:144 'fmt' — weaker FP (os/fmt rarely shadowed) so deferred; file if rawloginlib lands as proof-of-pattern, or bundle as shared astutil.IsStdPkgSelector refactor. NOTE strconvparseignorederror + jsonmarshalignoredeerror ALREADY use TypesInfo correctly (NOT gap).
patterns.node_filter_too_narrow: R40 NEW class (sg40a2 jsonmarshalignoredeerror). Linter's inspect nodeFilter omits an AST node shape where the target pattern also occurs: AssignStmt-only filter misses bare-call *ast.ExprStmt (implicit full discard). Distinct from parent-shape-too-narrow (that gates safe/unsafe on parent; this MISSES the node entirely). Probe every errcheck-style linter: does it filter ExprStmt for bare discards? Fix=add (*ast.ExprStmt)(nil).
patterns.parent-shape-too-narrow: R39 (uncheckedtypeassertion #39732). Linter gates safe/unsafe on ONE direct-parent AST type but safe construct also appears as other parents (ValueSpec/ParenExpr). Enumerate ALL parent shapes; unwrap ParenExpr.
patterns.impl_narrower_than_own_spec: R38 ssljson. When linter embeds/references its OWN spec, diff impl vs that text (.github/skills/ssl/ssl.json:150 Pass-4 -> #39493/#39494).
patterns.ci_enforce_strengthens_FP: An FP in a CI-ENFORCED linter is a build-blocker => strongest impact arg. Verify enforcement at cgo.yml:1123 LINTER_FLAGS before claiming.
patterns.alias_intermediate_var_FN: Gate on IMMEDIATE-parent AST shape misses intermediate var. lenstringzero#37741, timeafterleak#39181. Fix=follow var by object identity.
patterns.enforce_readiness_run_on_prod: grep prod for pattern->TP sites=enforce issue (httpnoctx#39016, timeafterleak#39180 landed). Append flag cgo.yml:1123 if zero-vio.
patterns.map_dedup_hides_duplicates: map[string]bool lookup sets silently collapse dup keys (ssljson#39494). Fix: if m[k]{report}; m[k]=true.
patterns.team_closes_fast: SIMPLE single-file PRs land 1-2d (httpnoctx <1d). COMPLEX control-flow linger (execcommand 7d+). Issues NOT always auto-closed on land (#39180 landed-but-open).

ci_enforce_14: cgo.yml:1123 LINTER_FLAGS (14, CONFIRMED R40): errstringmatch panicinlibrarycode manualmutexunlock osexitinlibrary rawloginlib regexpcompileinfunction fprintlnsprintf strconvparseignorederror jsonmarshalignoredeerror uncheckedtypeassertion fmterrorfnoverbs tolowerequalfold httpnoctx timeafterleak. Runs with -test=false (test files NOT analyzed). NOT enforced: ssljson, timesleepnocontext, execcommand, ctxbackground, hardcodedfilepath, lenstringzero, sortslice, seenmapbool, errorfwrapv, excessivefuncparams, largefunc, contextcancelnotdeferred, fileclosenotdeferred, ossetenvlibrary, errormessage.
